entries.description: Routed ai-assignment.md analysis (gemini-pro, $0.0162) and saved it to the set folder.

Implemented ai_router/verify_session.py: the Step-6 verify_session CLI (evidence assembly with git status + full diff and default generated-bundle exclusions, verification.md template fill, cross-provider route(task_type=session-verification), raw sN-verification*.md write-before-display, sN-issues*.json envelope on findings, classify_blocking wiring, raw-JSON disposition patch, L-064-7 tier-pin refusal, --dry-run). --help documents the contract.

Layer-1 pytest suite ai_router/tests/test_verify_session.py: 39 tests covering untracked-file visibility, exclusion defaults/overrides, artifact naming across rounds, idempotent field-preserving disposition patch, blocking classification wiring (exit 0/4), dry-run writes-nothing-routes-nothing, tier-pin refusal matrix, route-failure path. Full suite: 2522 passed, 5 skipped.

Dogfood round 1: routed gate REQUIRED (blast-radius, multi-module, breadth); ran this session's own Step 6 via the new CLI. Verifier gpt-5-4 returned ISSUES_FOUND with 2 Major findings ($0.229): (1) round1_verifier_tier read the LAST matching metrics row (would compare the L-064-7 pin against round 2's tier on a round-3 call) - accepted, fixed to first-matching-row + added a regression test; (2) bare 'import verify_session' in the test suite - context-gap vs the documented conftest sys.path convention, but accepted anyway (conftest supports either form; package-qualified import makes the target unambiguous). CLI wrote s1-verification.md, s1-issues.json, and the disposition patch exactly per contract; suite now 40 passed.

Dogfood round 2 ($0.185, gpt-5-4): 1 new Major - the round-1 fix could still fall through to a later round's tier when the round-1 metrics row exists but its tier is unreadable (fail-open contract violated). Accepted, fixed: the first matching row IS round 1 unconditionally; unreadable tier returns None. Added regression test test_unreadable_round1_row_fails_open_not_through. Suite: 41 passed.

Dogfood round 3 ($0.079, gpt-5-4): VERIFIED - the unreadable-round-1-row fix confirmed, no regressions. Dogfood complete: all three Step-6 rounds of this session ran through the new CLI itself. Total routed cost this session ~ $0.51.
Final suite run before close: 2524 passed, 5 skipped (baseline skips), 0 failed.
